description_short: GOLS certified 100% Natural Latex Contour Pillow with dual heights for personalized comfort, hypoallergenic and breathable.

construction_layers.name: Latex Foam
construction_layers.notes: GOLS certified 100% natural latex. Cervical contour shape.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash on delicate cycle with cold water.

proprietary_tech.name: Dual Height Design
proprietary_tech.description: Higher loft for side sleepers, lower loft for back sleepers.

faq_specs.question: How do these pillows provide targeted support?
faq_specs.answer: SleepyCat's Contour Latex Pillow has dual height options i.e. it has unique curves that aligns with the natural curvature of your spine, alleviating pressure points.

faq_specs.question: What is the lifespan of this pillow?
faq_specs.answer: Natural Latex Pillows are highly durable and can last for about 7-10 years.
